productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Jealous Ebony Brown Top Brown Tops
description: Composition Ebony brown top made of 200GSM looper knit fabric, with a round neck, three-fourth sleeves with a buttoned flap hem and graphic print on the front with stone embellishments on left chest   Fitting Regular Wash Care Machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring dry Dry in shade Medium iron, but do not iron on print Don the boho chic look in a really cool way with this trendy ebony brown top from jealous 21. The graphic print of stars and lines on the front coupled with a flap on the sleeve hems adds to it a fashionable edge, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims and heeled sandals for maximum style. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5’9”; Chest: 33”; Shoulders: 15.5”
